info.title: Blog Berita API
info.description: API documentation for Blog Berita application. This API provides endpoints for managing news articles, categories, tags, comments, advertisements, and user authentication.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all tags ordered by name
Retrieve a list of all categories ordered by name
Retrieve all comments for a specific post

post.description: Add a comment to a post (requires authentication)

get.description: Retrieve the active advertisement for a specific position

200.description: Ad data or null if no active ad

post.description: Record a page view for a post. Requires X-Visitor-Id header for unique visitor tracking.

get.description: Retrieve a single published post by its slug
Retrieve a list of all published blog posts with category, author, and tags
Verify user email using verification token from email link

400.description: Invalid, expired, or already verified token

put.description: Update the authenticated user's name and/or email

409.description: Email already used by another user

post.description: Reset password using token received via email

400.description: Invalid, expired, or already used token

post.description: Resend email verification link to the specified email address

200.description: Verification email resent if email is registered

400.description: Invalid email or email already verified

post.description: Create a new user account. A verification email will be sent.

message.example: Registrasi berhasil. Silakan cek email untuk verifikasi.

get.description: Retrieve the currently authenticated user's data

post.description: Authenticate user and return JWT token. Token is also set as httpOnly cookie.
Send password reset link to email. Rate limited to 3 requests per 30 minutes.

200.description: Reset link sent if email is registered

400.description: Validation error or incorrect current password

get.description: Retrieve total page views across all posts (requires admin)

put.description: Update an existing tag by ID (requires admin)

delete.description: Delete a tag by ID (requires admin)

get.description: Retrieve all comments with pagination (requires admin)

delete.description: Delete any comment by ID (requires admin)

put.description: Update an existing category by ID (requires admin)

delete.description: Delete a category by ID (requires admin)

put.description: Update an existing blog post with optional thumbnail upload (requires admin)
